allow: Bash(python -c "import pydantic, pydantic_settings, loguru, aiohttp, tenacity, sqlalchemy")
Bash(python -m pip install --quiet pydantic pydantic-settings loguru aiohttp tenacity sqlalchemy aiosqlite pytest pytest-asyncio)
Bash(python -m pip install --quiet py-clob-client eth-account web3)
Bash(python -c "from polymarket_bot.monitoring import WalletMonitor, SignalReader, FollowedWallet, DetectedSignal, MarketBuilder, MarketBuildError; print\('OK'\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, 'src'\); from polymarket_bot.main import _parse_args, _validate_settings, main; print\('imports OK'\)")
Bash(POLYGON_PRIVATE_KEY=$\(python -c "print\('0'*64\)"\) TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN=test TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID=0 LIVE_MODE=false PYTHONPATH=src python -m polymarket_bot.main --dry-run-check)
Bash(POLYGON_PRIVATE_KEY=abc TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN=test TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID=0 LIVE_MODE=true PYTHONPATH=src python -m polymarket_bot.main --dry-run-check)
Bash(python -c "from py_clob_client import clob_types; import inspect; print\([n for n in dir\(clob_types\) if not n.startswith\('_'\)]\)")
Bash(python -c "from py_clob_client.clob_types import OrderArgs, OrderType; import inspect; print\(inspect.signature\(OrderArgs\)\); print\(list\(OrderType\)\)")
Bash(python -c "from py_clob_client.clob_types import OrderType; print\(OrderType.__members__ if hasattr\(OrderType, '__members__'\) else vars\(OrderType\)\)")
Bash(python -c "from py_clob_client.client import ClobClient; print\([m for m in dir\(ClobClient\) if not m.startswith\('_'\)]\)")

Bash(python -c "import polymarket_bot.main; import polymarket_bot.execution.order_manager; import polymarket_bot.monitoring.exit_manager; import polymarket_bot.monitoring.signal_reader; print\('ok'\)")

Bash(PYTHONPATH=src python -c "import polymarket_bot.main; import polymarket_bot.execution.order_manager; import polymarket_bot.monitoring.exit_manager; import polymarket_bot.monitoring.signal_reader; print\('ok'\)")
